name: Brainrot Clicker
author: Poki
description: Brainrot Clicker is a clicker game where brainrot memes meet nonstop tapping fun! All your favorite wild characters are here, earning you coins while you click like crazy to speed things up. Upgrade your crew, unlock even more unhinged characters, and watch the madness grow! Ready to click your way through peak internet chaos? How to play Brainrot Clicker? Click or tap on the character to play. Who created Brainrot Clicker? Brainrot Clicker is created by WeLoPlay. Play their other games on Poki: My Cozy Home , Anime Dress Up , Star Blogger: Left or Right , Fruit Wheel , Glam Girl: Dress Up and Makeover , Hockey Stars , Nails DIY: Manicure Master , Stickman Bike , Stickman Race , Tag , Tag 2 , and wall-jumper! How can I play Brainrot Clicker for free? You can play Brainrot Clicker for free on Poki. Can I play Brainrot Clicker on mobile devices and desktop? Brainrot Clicker can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
